name: obsidian-task-tags-helper
description: Manage tags on unchecked tasks across your Obsidian vault.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.lint: eslint src scripts ./*.mjs --ext .ts,.mjs --ignore-pattern main.js --ignore-pattern main.js.map --ignore-pattern dist
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json package.json
